diagrams.title: SVD Decomposition Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the three-component structure of SVD: A = UΣV^T with dimensions and relationships
diagrams.purpose: Understanding matrix factorization structure and dimensions

diagrams.title: Geometric Interpretation of SVD
diagrams.description: Visualizes how SVD transforms a unit circle (sphere) into an ellipsoid
elements: Σ scaling (σ₁, σ₂ as axis lengths)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding transformation properties and singular values as axis lengths

diagrams.title: Low-Rank Approximation Visual
diagrams.description: Shows how increasing rank k improves matrix approximation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding Eckart-Young theorem and compression concept

diagrams.title: Singular Values Distribution
diagrams.description: Typical scree plot showing how singular values decay
elements: Energy concentration in first few values
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why low-rank approximation works and energy concentration
